since_last: 82% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.83%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 82% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.75% · BTC +1.53% · Gold +1.54% · Nasdaq100 +1.63%. 82% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.83%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.83%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.96%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.96%, HPE +10.03%, SYNA +7.50%, MU +6.84%, MRVL +6.38%. Laggards: AVAV -4.98%, PLTR -2.85%, IBM -2.44%, CRM -2.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.13% at $152.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
